# Issue #8792: Add package in requirement file resolve the Module Not Found Error
**Repository:** Project-MONAI/MONAI
**Author:** ytl0623
**Status:** closed
**Created At:** 2026-03-25T07:10:33Z

## Description
Fixes #8791

### Description

Add `backports` package to `requirements-min.txt` file

<!-- walkthrough_start -->

<details>
<summary>📝 Walkthrough</summary>

## Walkthrough

The file `requirements-min.txt` was updated with a single new dependency line: `backports.tarfile`. This adds the `backports.tarfile` package to the minimal test requirements to address a `ModuleNotFoundError` raised when setuptools' vendored code imports `backports.tarfile`.

## Estimated code review effort

🎯 1 (Trivial) | ⏱️ ~2 minutes

</details>

<!-- walkthrough_end -->
